MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom):
Paul DeAngelis, Esq. 415-385-1809 for Plaintiff.
Norman Chong, Esq. 717-576-1380 Tarkington, O'Neill, Barrack & Chong for Defendant.

THE PARTIES STIPULATE TO THE MATTER BEING DECIDED BY THE JUDGE PRO TEM. THE PARTIES AND THE JUDGE PRO TEM APPEARING REMOTELY AUTHORIZE THE CLERK TO SIGN THE FORMAL STIPULATION FORM ON THEIR BEHALF.

RULING - ARGUED. Mr. DeAngelis argues boiler plate objections should be removed. They are overbroad, ambiguous and burdensome. Mr. Chong responds. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PLAINTIFF JULIO CRUZ, JOAQUINA HERNANDEZ, EDSON MORALES GUILLEN, BRENDA MORALES GUILLEN's Motion To Compel Further Responses From Defendants To Plaintiffs Requests For Production Of Documents (Set One); Request For Monetary Sanctions.

Taken Under Submission.

Judge Pro Tem: David McDonald, Clerk: M. Goodman, not reported. =(302/JPT)
